# Nurdai — Full LLM Context

> AI Visibility & digital discoverability consultancy. Bilingual site (Turkish + English).

## Organization
- Name: Nurdai
- Founder: Nurdan Çetin (also known as Nurdai)
- URL: https://nurdai.com
- Email: hello@nurdai.com

- Location: Bodrum, Muğla, Turkey
- Services: AI Visibility, GEO, AI Search Optimization, Semantic SEO, Entity SEO, Digital Authority, AI Visibility Audit
